name: @chbrain/khai-engine-gift
description: khai gift engine — how a gift creates obligation, binds the parties, and requires a return
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: How a gift creates obligation, binds the parties, and requires a return.

card.wire: Link the phase the persona is running (giving, receiving, or reciprocating) under Projection.
card.issue: What the gift is, who gives it, and what it costs to give, receive, or refuse.
card.require: A giver, a receiver, and a transfer of something that carries social weight.
card.enforce: Do not model the gift as a free or neutral exchange. Every gift creates an obligation; accepting creates a debt; refusal is also a move.
card.setup: Name what is being given, what history of exchange exists between the parties, and what the gift signals about the relationship.
